---
title: "Annotation Coding Environment"

---

ACE is an open-source desktop application for collaborative qualitative coding of text. You can find out more about ACE in the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/usyd-soles-edu/annotation-coding-environment). If you want to learn to use ACE, begin with [Getting started](getting-started.qmd).


## Citation

Harianto, J., Van Den Berg, F., Lilje, O., Pang, R., & Widjaja, M. (2026). *Annotation Coding Environment (ACE) for collaborative qualitative coding* (Version 1.0.0) [Computer software]. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20488469
